feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Testing and Analysis
feed.subtitle: ABAP Testing and Analysis Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE is working in SE37 but is only partially working through program
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is my first post so I might not come across very clearly. Please bear with me.

I am using 'BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE' to create a PR in EBAN table, which also contains ADRNR/ADRN2 fields.

My requirement states that the ADRNR/ADRN2 field should get auto-generated in the record once the BAPI is executed, and I will then update the same ADRNR into ADRC table manually.

I read that the prerequisite for this requirement is that the REQUISITION_ADDRDELIVERY structure should be populated, and I am doing the same.

However, once the BAPI is executed through my program, the PR is generated with empty ADRNR/ADRN2 fields. If I execute the same BAPI through SE37 using the same inputs, the ADRNR field is being populated.

Any ideas on where I might be going wrong?

Thank you

entry.title: ABAP & XML
entry.content: I have more information about my previous post.  When a database field is empty, I need to build out a URL request and will receive an XML response.  I have examples of what both should look like and it makes sense.  I just need to know how to accomplish this through SAP.  SM59??  WebServices??  Direction toward training and a full solution would be greatly appreciated.  TIA

entry.title: User Exit For IW47
entry.content:
hello,

i need to add a field in the input parameters to the IW47 transaction
should i use a user exit? which one should i use?

thanks

entry.title: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi,

i added a custom field in append in RIHAFVR structure.

But when i launch transaction IW47 the field is not displayed in alv.

How can i display the field?

 

thank you

entry.title: How to append an existing custom structure to a standard table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom structure and I need to add it in append inside a standard table.

but if I click the "Append structure" button it tells me that the structure already exists:

I don't want to create the structure, because it already exists, but I just need to add it to the standard table. How can I do that?

 

thank you

entry.title: Syntax_error in Outbound queue GTD
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day,

 

I encountered a syntax error in our outbound queue for the location GTD.

 

The error message is "CL_EXIT_MASTER================CM002". I tried to manually execute the problem, but it was always saying "Update was canceled".


I hope anyone could help me to resolve this issue.


Thank you,
Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: HTML in outlook and SOST emails not same
entry.content:
HI Experts,

HTML in outlook and SOST emails not same:

Text in SOST:

Email as below:

COde:

********************************
  MOVE '<table width="750" BORDER=2>' TO lt_objcont1_wa.
  APPEND lt_objcont1_wa TO lt_objcont1.
  MOVE '<tbody> <tr>' TO lt_objcont1_wa.
  APPEND lt_objcont1_wa TO lt_objcont1.

***************Code for prod Info*************************

  DATA: lv_str1(500) TYPE c.
  lv_str1 = i_zswf_zre-prodh.
  MOVE '<tr><td width="375"><strong><FONT face=Arial size=2>Prod Info</strong></FONT></td>' TO lt_objcont1_wa.
  APPEND lt_objcont1_wa TO lt_objcont1.
  CONCATENATE '<td width="375">' '<FONT face=Arial size=2>' lv_str1 '</FONT></td>' INTO lt_objcont1_wa.
  APPEND lt_objcont1_wa TO lt_objcont1.

entry.title: Dump Error
entry.content: Can anyone help me out that how to solve this error !

entry.title: Username Change in Incoming IDOC
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts ,

For incoming IDOC from CPI , the username is not  getting changed from custom user name  (R_xxxx) to WF-BATCH at status 62 (IDOC passed to application) with the processing program SAPLBD20 . Due to that  custom user ID ( System User type ),  Authorization is failing to create the document . This is happening all of sudden.

Expectation is that it should have WF-BATCH as user .

I have checked all the possibilities but couldn't find what could be the cause of this issue . Please let me know if this can be  due to any enhancement or IDOC configuration for that Partner profile/ message type.

entry.title: F-03 Screen enhancement
entry.content:
Dear All,

I need to add custom fields in highlighted below area in F-03. Can anybody kindly guide how this can be achieved using screen exit or Badi? Or is there any other way?

Regards.

entry.title: C4C fill table in fuction
entry.content: I have a function and I want to fill the returns from this function into a table within the same function. How can I do this? It's an emergency, can you help me?

entry.title: SAP ABAP , FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG , find option is needed .
entry.content:
hi All, 

I am facing issue in selection dynamic creation.

Here requirement is to add find option, since the dynamic selection is created using FREE_SELECTION_DAILOG. here I am not able to add any find option.

 

any help is highly appreciated.

thanks in advance!

entry.title: LSMW dosn't work for FIBPU(intermediary bank) for vendor with more than one bank key
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm on S4HANA Release 1809, I need to add intermediary bank for 200 vendors, and I'm using tcode FIBPU.

Whene recording the lsmw, these are the steps (see attached steps and error message) :

Step 1 : I enter the vendor number and execute.

Step 2 : The system display the different bank keys available for the entered vendor, I should select the concerned bank key : I set a filter on the bank key and double click on the good bank key.
Step 3 : I enter my sender bank criteria. 

The issue is that when executing the LSMW in foreground, it seems that it's not able to set the filter and remember correctly the selected value in the next screen : 

Error message : Error message 00344 : No batch input data for dypro SAP MSSY0 0120

Any idea on how to solve this please ? thank you!

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Display custom logic from abap program into cds view
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am working on a cds view which displays all the selected fields via a fiori elements preview. I have an abap program that calculates some custom fields as such:

REPORT z_outstanding_days.

DATA: lt_swwwihead TYPE TABLE OF swwwihead,
      ls_swwwihead TYPE swwwihead,
      lv_days_outstanding TYPE i,
      lv_current_date TYPE d.

* Get the current date
lv_current_date = sy-datum.

* Select data from SWWWIHEAD table
SELECT * FROM swwwihead INTO TABLE lt_swwwihead WHERE wi_stat = 'READY'.

* Loop through the selected work items
LOOP AT lt_swwwihead INTO ls_swwwihead.
  * Calculate the number of days outstanding
  lv_days_outstanding = lv_current_date - ls_swwwihead-crdate.

  * Print the work item ID and the number of days outstanding
  WRITE: / 'Work Item ID:', ls_swwwihead-wi_id,
           'Days Outstanding:', lv_days_outstanding.
ENDLOOP.

How can I pull the custom calculated field from the abap program into the following CDS view

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZV_OUTSTANDING_ITEMS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Outstanding Work Items with Approvers'
define view ZV_OutstandingItems as select from swwwihead
  LEFT OUTER join swwuserwi on swwwihead.wi_id = swwuserwi.wi_id
{
  key swwwihead.wi_id,
  swwwihead.crdate,
  swwwihead.wi_text,
}

entry.title: How Gen AI can supercharge the quality of your ERP migration
entry.content:
Our research[1] shows that over 93% of organizations that haven’t upgraded to SAP S/4HANA have already started or plan to migrate within the next 24 months. Yet these organizations will naturally face a number of transitional challenges – ranging from security risks and lack of in-house expertise to customer dissatisfaction and possible financial impact. In order to succeed, organizations must implement robust continuous testing methods that will minimize this risk and deliver uninterrupted business outcomes, while managing the additional changes and updates demanded after the transition. Technology will inevitably play a critical role in executing this strategy effectively, and the rise of new technologies - like Generative AI - must be embraced in future approaches. Read more on how GenAI can aid this transformation here https://bit.ly/3YTE1OH

[1] State of Worldwide Business Assurance for SAP Solutions 2023

entry.title: How to get WBS element field data into the XML file for PO print in SAP Public loud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was trying to generate XML for the PO output but i was unable to find the "WBS Element", also the same field is not available in the data Source and the data source not extendable as well.

However the same field is available in GRN XML file. Can anyone suggest me how to add the WBS Element in the data source/XML file for PO print.

Below is the WBS Element in GRN XML file. "

"

Awaiting for your suggestions.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

The third-party application is sending data to SAP Standard RFC BAPI parameter, then the BAPI will prepare a data then extract it / send it to third party application

My question is how to view the RFC BAPI received data and sent to third party application without any code modification? is there a log history of data received/sent in SAP or tcode I can use to view the received/sent data?


Like for example: these BAPI parameters was sent to third party application yesterday after a week I want to review/check the data sent to third party application

entry.title: AMDP CDS View consuming a CDS view returning error due to a non-existent record present in the DB
entry.content:
Hi All,

An AMDP CDS view(Final View) consuming another CDS view(Intermediate/Source View) is returning the below error based out of a record that does not exist in the Intermediate/Source CDS View. However, the error causing record does exist in the underlying database which does not satisfy the conditions in the Intermediate/Source CDS view and consequently not present in the later. 

Database returned the SQL code 303. Error text:
invalid DATE, TIME or TIMESTAMP value: SQL Error#

Some more context.

The source database has 2 records including an incorrect date value - 6/31/2024 and another proper record

The intermediate view ignores the invalid record and shows only one record that is valid.

The final AMDP view is throwing error eventhough this record is non-existent in the intermediate view.

The error goes away if an additional condition to avoid this record is implmented in the intermediate view eventhough the number of records in this view remains the same with or without this condition.

Any suggestions or insights?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content:
Hello! Following is my codes to test the dynamic variable in WHERE. The sentence 'WHERE (gt_where).' is without any syntax error. But when I run it. ABAP has an error message : 'An error has occurred while parsing a dynamic entry.' How can I correct this?  Thanks a lot 

 

DATA gs_where TYPE c LENGTH 72.
DATA gt_where LIKE TABLE OF gs_where.
DATA gv_carrname TYPE scarr-carrname.
DATA gv_carrid1 TYPE scarr-carrid VALUE 'AC'.
DATA gv_carrid2 TYPE scarr-carrid VALUE 'AF'.

*concatenate 'carrid='''gv_carrid1'''' INTO gs_where.
gs_where = |carrid='{ gv_carrid1 }'|.
APPEND gs_where TO gt_where.
gs_where = 'OR'.
APPEND gs_where TO gt_where.

*CONCATENATE 'carrid='''gv_carrid2'''' INTO gs_where.
gs_where = |carrid='{ gv_carrid2 }'|.
APPEND gs_where TO gt_where.
BREAK-POINT.
SELECT carrname
  INTO gv_carrname
  FROM scarr
  WHERE (gt_where). 
*  WHERE carrid = 'AC' OR carrid = 'AF'. 
  WRITE / gv_carrname.
ENDSELECT.

entry.title: SPROXY End to End Testing - Shop -> PI 7.5 ->S4HANA Scenario
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding a project I’m currently working on. Let me provide some background details for better context.

Background

We have a scenario that consists of four main steps:

  1. A Webshop sends an order to the Process Integration (PI) system.
  2. The PI system receives the message via SOAP, validates its structure, and forwards it to the backend system via HTTP. A valid and working HTTP destination is already configured for this.
  3. In the backend system, using SPROXY, we handle the namespace of the ESR (Enterprise Service Repository) and can view all design objects. A service provider processes the message, forwards it to an ABAP class, which extracts the relevant data, fills a BAPI, and finally creates a sales document in the SAP backend using the payload data.
  4. This scenario has been running smoothly, and the existing functionality is working perfectly.

New Requirement

The requirements have now changed. The webshop will send two new optional fields if they are available. To address this, we made the following changes:

  • The PI structure was updated to handle these two fields (this part is already completed and working).
  • In the backend, the ABAP class logic was updated to:
    • Map these new fields if provided.
    • Pass the new data into a newly declared table. This table will handle the additional fields in parallel with the existing configuration.

With this update, the new fields will be processed as follows:

  • If the fields are present in the payload, they are mapped to the new table and passed along with the original tables to the BAPI.
  • If the fields are not provided, the process will continue as before, without impacting the existing functionality.

After implementing these changes, the scenario appears to function correctly. Messages sent from the PI Test Tool are successfully delivered to the backend.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Current Challenge

When testing through the PI Test Tool, I see that the messages are being delivered to the backend. However, I am unable to verify if the sales document is being created correctly or if the new fields are included when provided.

Request

Can you guide me on how to perform an end-to-end test to ensure the functionality works as expected? Specifically:

  • Which SAP transactions can I use to check if the sales document has been created successfully and verify the inclusion of the new fields? Which data can I use for the search process?
  • If debugging is needed, how can I:
    • Import the payload into the ABAP code for testing?
    • Check if the message sent from the PI Test Tool is properly processed in the backend?

Any help in verifying this scenario end-to-end would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support!
